title: Item 358
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Item 358''' was a variance of regulations regarding the licensing of [[Air taxi/Legends|air taxis]]. It is unknown if this item passed in the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] [[Policy and Resources Council]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice]]''

[[Category:Galactic Alliance laws and acts]]
